question:
[Previous Feedback] File naming does not meet our standards. Should use `20260324_<description>.md` format, e.g. `20260324_weekly_tech_report.md`. The date must be today's date (20260324) and placed as a prefix.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please prepare an email draft for the PM regarding the API v2.3.0 change notification, saved as JSON in the day07/ directory. Include to, subject, body_summary, and draft_created_at (current time, approximately 10:00) fields.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 11:07 EDT] [Previous Feedback] File naming does not meet our standards. Should use `20260324_<description>.md` format, e.g. `20260324_weekly_tech_report.md`. The date must be today's date (20260324) and placed as a prefix.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please prepare an email draft for the PM regarding the API v2.3.0 change notification, saved as JSON in the day07/ directory. Include to, subject, body_summary, and draft_created_at (current time, approximately 10:00) fields.
I'll prepare the API v2.3.0 change notification email draft as a JSON file in the day07/ directory.

arguments.content:
{
  "to": "pm@oriontech.com",
  "subject": "API v2.3.0 Change Notification – Action Required by Q2 2026",
  "body_summary": "Dear PM,

This email notifies you of upcoming API changes for v2.3.0 that will impact client integrations.

KEY CHANGES:
1. v1 API Deprecation – All v1 endpoints will be deprecated by end of Q2 2026 (June 30). Clients have a 3-month migration window.
2. New Authentication – v2.3.0 introduces OAuth2 + JWT token-based authentication. API keys will be phased out.
3. Updated Rate Limits – Free tier: 1,000 req/hour; Paid tier: 10,000 req/hour.

TIMELINE:
• March 24: Stakeholder notification
• March 20–24: Migration guide, SDK updates, staging environment preparation
• Q2 2026: v1 deprecation deadline

ACTION REQUIRED:
Please coordinate with customer success to notify affected clients and incorporate this timeline into upcoming communications.

The backend team will deliver technical documentation and SDK updates by March 24.

Let me know if you need additional details for client communications.

Best,
Alex Zhang
Backend Tech Lead",
  "draft_created_at": "2026-03-24T10:00:00+08:00"
}

{
  "to": "pm@oriontech.com",
  "subject": "API v2.3.0 Change Notification – Action Required by Q2 2026",
  "body_summary": "Dear PM,

This email notifies you of upcoming API changes for v2.3.0 that will impact client integrations.

KEY CHANGES:
1. v1 API Deprecation – All v1 endpoints will be deprecated by end of Q2 2026 (June 30). Clients have a 3-month migration window.
2. New Authentication – v2.3.0 introduces OAuth2 + JWT token-based authentication. API keys will be phased out.
3. Updated Rate Limits – Free tier: 1,000 req/hour; Paid tier: 10,000 req/hour.

TIMELINE:
• March 24: Stakeholder notification
• March 20–24: Migration guide, SDK updates, staging environment preparation
• Q2 2026: v1 deprecation deadline

ACTION REQUIRED:
Please coordinate with customer success to notify affected clients and incorporate this timeline into upcoming communications.

The backend team will deliver technical documentation and SDK updates by March 24.

Let me know if you need additional details for client communications.

Best,
Alex Zhang
Backend Tech Lead",
  "draft_created_at": "2026-03-24T10:00:00+08:00"
}

content.text:
Saved the API v2.3.0 change notification email draft to `day07/20260324_api_v2.3.0_pm_notification.json`.

**Draft Summary:**
- **To**: pm@oriontech.com
- **Subject**: API v2.3.0 Change Notification – Action Required by Q2 2026
- **Key Content**:
  - v1 API deprecation by end of Q2 2026 (3-month migration window)
  - New OAuth2 + JWT authentication requirement
  - Updated rate limits (1k/10k per hour by tier)
  - Timeline and deliverables from the backend team
  - Action required for PM: coordinate client notifications
